Woodward, Andy (2635) - Carlsen, Magnus (2840)
TePe Sigeman & Co Chess Tournament 2026 (Chess.com) [06] 2026.05.06
E73 King's Indian, Semi-Averbakh system

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 g6 3.Nc3 Bg7 4.e4 d6 5.Be2 O-O 6.Be3 a5 7.Nf3 Ng4 8.Bg5 h6 9.Bc1 e5 10.O-O Nf6 11.Be3 Ng4 12.Bc1 Nd7 13.h3 Ngf6 14.Be3 exd4 15.Nxd4 Nc5 16.f3 Nh5 17.Qd2 g5 18.Bd1 Be6 19.b3 a4 20.Bc2 axb3 21.axb3 Rxa1 22.Rxa1 Be5 23.Ra7 c6 24.Nce2 Nf4 25.Bf2 Nxe2+ 26.Nxe2 Qf6 27.Be3 Bxh3 28.b4 Nd7 29.Rxb7 Be6 30.Nd4 Ra8 31.Nxe6 Qxe6 32.Bd3 Ra1+ 33.Kf2 Nf6 34.Ra7 Rh1 35.Ke2 Nh5 36.Qa2 g4 37.f4 Ra1 38.Qxa1 Bxa1 39.Rxa1 Ng3+ 40.Kd2 Nxe4+ 41.Kc2 f5 42.b5 cxb5 43.Ra8+ Kg7 44.cxb5 Qd5 45.Rc8 Nf2 46.Rc7+ Kg6 47.Bc4 Qd1+ 48.Kb2 d5
